examples.text: There is a solid chance that humanity will persist for thousands, maybe millions of years.
examples.explanation: 这里的 persist 意思是“持续存在、延续下去”，指人类会继续存在很多年。

reviewSessions.example_text: Humans throughout history felt like they would witness the apocalypse and this feels especially true today, but you are probably not living in the end times. There is a solid chance that humanity will persist for thousands, maybe millions of years. If this might be the very start of our history, what can we dream of achieving? Just like our very first ancestors six million years ago,
reviewSessions.feedback: 抓到“坚持”这一相关义项，但此处更应理解为“持续存在、延续”。
matched_points: 与 persist 的“坚持”义项有关联
missing_points: 未对应题目给出的释义“持续存在；延续”
未结合例句中 humanity will persist 表达“人类将继续存在下去”
